# post — ARCHITECTURE.md
# Last Updated: 2026-06-02
# Status: CURRENT SOURCE OF TRUTH — generated by ARCHITECT 2026-06-02

## Feature Overview

The `post` feature owns all social content rendering, interaction, and lifecycle
management for the VCSM platform. It covers post creation read paths, edit,
soft-delete, reactions (like/dislike/rose), sharing, comments, comment reactions,
reply threads, mentions, visibility gating, and the PostCard UI component consumed
by the feed and profile features. The module is organized into two sub-modules:
`postcard/` (post rendering and actions) and `commentcard/` (comment rendering and
actions), plus top-level screens and adapters. No standalone engine path — all
data access uses direct Supabase DAL calls with hydration via the `@hydration`
engine alias.

**Source Path:** apps/VCSM/src/features/post/
**Engine Path:** None — feature-only (uses `@hydration` alias for actor presentation hydration)

---

## Layer Presence

| Layer | Present | Path |
|---|---|---|
| Controllers | YES | postcard/controller/, commentcard/controller/ |
| DALs | YES | postcard/dal/, commentcard/dal/ |
| Models | YES | postcard/model/post.model.js, commentcard/model/Comment.model.js |
| Hooks | YES | postcard/hooks/, commentcard/hooks/ |
| Screens | YES | screens/ |
| Components | YES | postcard/components/, commentcard/components/, postcard/postModules/ |
| Adapters | YES | adapters/, postcard/adapters/, adapters/postcard/components/, adapters/commentcard/ |
| Engine controllers | NO | None — feature-only |
| Engine DALs | NO | None — uses @hydration alias inline in feature DALs |

---

## Active Controllers

| Controller | Purpose | Auth Gate |
|---|---|---|
| deletePost.controller.js | Soft-delete a post (sets deleted_at) | actorId required; owner gate enforced in DAL (.eq("actor_id", actorId)) |
| editPost.controller.js | Update post text + replay mentions | actorId required; owner gate enforced in DAL (.eq("actor_id", actorId)) |
| getPostById.controller.js | Fetch single post with visibility check | viewerActorId optional; checkPostVisibilityDAL runs block/privacy/follow gate |
| getPostMentionMap.controller.js | Read mentioned actor presentations for a post | Read-only; no ownership gate |
| getPostReactions.controller.js | Read actor's reaction + aggregated counts | actorId required (throws); read-only |
| sendRose.controller.js | Insert rose gift record and notify post owner | actorId required (throws); checkPostExistsDAL guard; no self-guard |
| togglePostReaction.controller.js | Toggle like/dislike reaction, notify on creation | actorId required (throws); checkPostExistsDAL guard; VALID_REACTIONS whitelist |
| postComments.controller.js | Load comment thread (tree), create root and reply comments | actorId required for create; checkPostExistsDAL guard on mutations; owner notification dispatched |
| postComments.count.controller.js | Read comment count for a post | Read-only; no auth gate |
| commentReactions.controller.js | Toggle comment like, notify comment owner | actorId + commentId required; no self-like guard |
| commentReactions.hydrator.controller.js | Batch-hydrate comment reaction state for a viewer | Read-only batch |
| deleteComment.controller.js | Soft-delete a comment | actorId required; owner gate enforced in DAL (.eq("actor_id", actorId)) |
| editComment.controller.js | Update comment content | actorId required; owner gate enforced in DAL (.eq("actor_id", actorId)) |

**Note:** `postComments.count.controller.js` and `commentReactions.hydrator.controller.js`
are supplemental read controllers (count + batch hydration) not confirmed as dead — treat as active.

---

## Active DALs

| DAL | Tables | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| post.read.dal.js | vc.posts, vc.post_media | fetchPostByIdDAL + checkPostExistsDAL; uses @hydration for actor presentation |
| post.write.dal.js | vc.posts, identity.actor_directory, vc.post_mentions | updatePostTextDAL, softDeletePostDAL; contains replacePostMentions (DAL→DAL boundary violation — S-1 OPEN) |
| postMentions.read.dal.js | vc.post_mentions | readPostMentionedActorIdsDAL; uses @hydration for actor display |
| postMentions.write.dal.js | vc.post_mentions | insertPostMentionsDAL |
| postReactions.read.dal.js | vc.post_reactions | fetchActorReactionDAL, fetchReactionSummaryDAL (RPC: post_reactors_summary_one) |
| postReactions.write.dal.js | vc.post_reactions | insertReactionDAL, updateReactionDAL, deleteReactionDAL |
| postVisibility.dal.js | moderation.blocks, vc.actor_privacy_settings, vc.actor_follows | checkPostVisibilityDAL; multi-schema; block + privacy + follow chain |
| roseGifts.actor.dal.js | vc.post_rose_gifts | listRoseGiftsByPostDAL, insertRoseGiftDAL |
| commentLikes.dal.js | vc.comment_likes | isCommentLiked, likeComment, unlikeComment, getCommentLikeCount, batch list variants |
| comments.dal.js | vc.post_comments | createComment, updateCommentContentDAL, softDeleteCommentDAL, readCommentActorAndPostIdDAL |
| postComments.count.dal.js | vc.post_comments | Count query |
| postComments.read.dal.js | vc.post_comments | listPostComments, readPostCommentActorIdDAL, insertPostComment (duplicate insert path — also in comments.dal.js) |

**RPC calls:** `post_reactors_summary_one` (vc schema)

## Active Hooks

| Hook | What It Calls | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| usePostReactions.js | getPostReactionsController, togglePostReactionController, sendRoseController | Full reaction lifecycle (load, toggle, send rose) for a post |
| useDeletePostAction.js | softDeletePostController | Memoized delete action bound to actorId |
| useEditPost.js | editPostController | Post text edit lifecycle |
| usePostCovers.js | moderation.usePostVisibility (adapter) | Track which posts are covered (reported/hidden) for a viewer |
| useCommentCovers.js | moderation.useCommentVisibility (adapter) | Track which comments are covered for a viewer |
| usePostDetailPost.js | getPostById | Fetch and hold post detail data |
| usePostDetailEditing.js | editPostController | Edit state management for post detail screen |
| usePostDetailMenus.js | (local state) | Post actions menu open/close logic |
| usePostDetailReplying.js | createReplyComment (via postComments.controller) | Reply compose state |
| usePostDetailReporting.js | moderation.useReportFlow, moderation.useCommentVisibility, moderation.usePostVisibility | Report flow + cover state for post detail |
| usePostReactionOps.js | togglePostReactionController, sendRoseController | Reaction ops with optimistic counts |
| useCommentCard.js | commentReactions.controller, deleteComment.controller, editComment.controller | Comment card lifecycle |
| useCommentThread.js | postComments.controller (loadCommentThread, createRootComment, createReplyComment) | Comment thread load and compose |
| useEditCommentAction.js | editCommentController | Comment edit flow |
| usePostCommentCount.js | postComments.count.controller | Comment count read |

## Engine Dependencies

| Engine | Import Path | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| hydration (alias) | @hydration | Actor presentation enrichment inside post.read.dal.js and postMentions.read.dal.js — resolves actorId to display_name, photo_url, username, vport_name, vport_slug |

---

## Cross-Feature Dependencies

| Feature | What Is Imported | Direction |
|---|---|---|
| notifications | publishVcsmNotification (via @/features/notifications/adapters/notifications.adapter) | post → notifications (outbound, adapter-clean) |
| moderation | usePostVisibility, useCommentVisibility, useReportFlow, ReportModal, ReportThanksOverlay, ReportedObjectCover (all via moderation adapters) | post → moderation (outbound, adapter-clean) |
| feed | useFeed (via @/features/feed/adapters/hooks/useFeed.adapter) | post → feed (PostFeed.screen.jsx consumes feed hook — reverse boundary concern) |

---

## Authorization Pattern

All mutation controllers use the **actorId required + DAL-owner-gate** pattern:
- Controller layer validates `actorId` presence (early return `{ ok: false }` or `throw`)
- For post/comment ownership mutations (delete, edit): DAL enforces `.eq("actor_id", actorId)` — the DB update/delete silently returns no rows if the actor does not own the record, and the controller checks `if (!data)` to surface "not found or not owned"
- For reactions and rose: controller validates actorId presence and post existence (`checkPostExistsDAL`) before mutation; no self-reaction guard
- For reads: `getPostById` runs `checkPostVisibilityDAL` — checks active blocks (bidirectional, moderation schema), actor privacy settings, and follow relationship
- **OPEN RISK (V-1):** `createSystemPost` in the `upload/` feature accepts `actorId` from caller without an `actor_owners` membership check. The DB-level RLS gap (DR-001) means any authenticated session can INSERT into `vc.posts` as any actor. Migration `20260522010000` endorsed but pending staging.

---

## Module Independence Classification

**MOSTLY INDEPENDENT**

The core post/postcard/commentcard layers are self-contained (own DALs, controllers,
hooks, models). Outbound adapter boundaries to `notifications` and `moderation` are
clean (adapter imports only). The only structural concern is `PostFeed.screen.jsx`
importing `useFeed` directly from the `feed` feature, which creates a reverse
dependency where a post-owned screen consumes a feed-owned hook.

---

## Architecture State

**EVOLVING**

The core post and comment layers are stable and well-structured. Three active structural
issues flag the architecture as evolving rather than stable: (1) the `replacePostMentions`
DAL-to-DAL boundary violation (S-1 OPEN), (2) dual PostCard adapter paths creating
ambiguous consumer surface, and (3) `PostFeed.screen.jsx` crossing into `feed` feature
for its primary data hook. The VPORT-owned `createSystemPost` path with no ownership
check (V-1) is the highest-severity open finding.

---

## Known Structural Risks

1. **V-1 (HIGH) — `createSystemPost` no actor ownership verification:** The VPORT publish path (`apps/VCSM/src/features/profiles/kinds/vport/controller/`) inserts into `vc.posts` without checking actor ownership. Combined with the pre-existing DB RLS gap (DR-001), this is the top risk. Migration `20260522010000` pending staging.
2. **DR-001 (CRITICAL) — `vc.posts` INSERT RLS gap:** Any authenticated Supabase session can INSERT as any actor without actor_owners membership check. Migration endorsed by CARNAGE, staging pending.
3. **S-1 (MEDIUM) — `replacePostMentions` DAL-to-DAL boundary violation:** `post.write.dal.js` internally calls `insertPostMentionsDAL` (another DAL) and coordinates a delete+insert sequence. This multi-step orchestration belongs in `editPost.controller.js`.
4. **Dual PostCard adapter paths:** `adapters/postCard.adapter.js` and `postcard/adapters/PostCard.jsx` both export PostCard. Consumer import path is ambiguous.
5. **`PostFeed.screen.jsx` reverse-imports `useFeed` from the `feed` feature:** A post-owned screen depends on a feed-owned hook — reverse of the canonical direction.
6. **V-2 (MEDIUM) — `searchMentionSuggestions` viewerActorId always null:** Blocked/blocking actors may appear in mention autocomplete. Located in `upload/` feature but affects post publish flow.
7. **Duplicate comment insert path:** `postComments.read.dal.js` contains `insertPostComment` alongside `comments.dal.js` `createComment` — two write paths into `vc.post_comments`.
8. **`screens/utils/detectIOS.js` misplaced:** Utility belongs in `shared/` not inside a feature's screens folder.

---

## Recommended Handoffs

- **ELEKTRA** — Trace V-1 source-to-sink chain for `createSystemPost`; propose concrete ownership patch before any release work
- **CARNAGE** — Stage and apply migration `20260522010000` to close DR-001 CRITICAL `vc.posts` INSERT RLS gap
- **IRONMAN** — Ownership decision for `replacePostMentions` move to controller layer (S-1); dual adapter consolidation decision; `detectIOS.js` relocation
- **SENTRY** — Dual PostCard adapter boundary enforcement; `postComments.read.dal.js` duplicate insert path
- **SPIDER-MAN** — No test coverage exists; post reactions, delete, and edit controllers are untested

---

## Final Module Status

**MOSTLY COMPLETE**

All primary layers (controllers, DALs, models, hooks, screens, components, adapters) are
present and structurally sound. Feature is active and rendering in production. Four open
security/architecture findings block THOR eligibility. Testing is entirely absent.

### DB Table Coverage (confirmed from source reads)

| Schema | Table | Access Type |
|---|---|---|
| vc | posts | read, update (edit/delete), insert (via createSystemPost) |
| vc | post_media | read (join in post.read.dal) |
| vc | post_reactions | read, insert, update, delete |
| vc | post_rose_gifts | read, insert |
| vc | post_comments | read, insert, update (edit), update (soft delete) |
| vc | post_mentions | read, delete, insert |
| vc | comment_likes | read, insert, delete |
| vc | actor_privacy_settings | read (visibility check) |
| vc | actor_follows | read (visibility check — follow gate) |
| identity | actor_directory | read (mention handle resolution) |
| moderation | blocks | read (visibility check — block gate) |

**RPC:** `vc.post_reactors_summary_one(post_id)` — reaction count aggregation

### Execution Path Trace (top mutation — deletePost)

UI (PostFeed.screen.jsx or PostDetail.view.jsx)
  → useDeletePostAction({ actorId })
    → softDeletePostController({ actorId, postId })
      → softDeletePostDAL({ actorId, postId })
        → supabase.schema("vc").from("posts").update({ deleted_at, deleted_by_actor_id })
          .eq("id", postId).eq("actor_id", actorId)

### Execution Path Trace (reaction toggle)

UI (ReactionBar.jsx)
  → usePostReactions(postId) → toggleReaction(reaction)
    → togglePostReactionController({ postId, actorId, reaction, currentCounts })
      → checkPostExistsDAL(postId) [guard]
      → fetchActorReactionDAL({ postId, actorId }) [read existing]
      → deleteReactionDAL / updateReactionDAL / insertReactionDAL [conditional write]
      → publishVcsmNotification (on new creation only)
      → applyReactionDelta(currentCounts) or fetchReactionSummaryDAL [count resolution]

### Execution Path Trace (post detail read)

UI (PostDetail.screen.jsx)
  → PostDetail.view.jsx
    → usePostDetailPost(postId, viewerActorId)
      → getPostById(postId, viewerActorId)
        → fetchPostByIdDAL(postId) [raw + hydrated actor]
        → checkPostVisibilityDAL({ postActorId, viewerActorId })
          → moderation.blocks [block check]
          → vc.actor_privacy_settings [privacy check]
          → vc.actor_follows [follow check if private]
